---
title: "Figure S8"
execute:
  echo: false
---

**Figure S8. Maximum likelihood phylogeny of all IIIA 2018-2020 VP1-2B region sequences.** Identical genomes are shown as dots on the vertical branch. 

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
pkglist = c("ape", "ggplot2", "ggtree","dplyr", "stringr", "cowplot", "phytools")
lapply(pkglist, require, character.only = TRUE)
```

```{r}
OUTPUT_DIR=Sys.getenv("OUTPUT_DIR")
RENAMED_IIIA_TR_TREE=Sys.getenv("RENAMED_IIIA_TR_TREE")

tree <- read.tree(RENAMED_IIIA_TR_TREE)
tree <- drop.tip(tree, "HepA/USA/MA/0046/2018")
length(tree$tip.label)
tree <- phytools::midpoint.root(tree)

tree_plotted <- ggtree(tree) +
  geom_tippoint(size = 1) +
  theme_tree2() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.line.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  geom_treescale(x = 0.002, y = 30, width = 0.001, fontsize = 2)

# getMRCA for an unrooted tree returns the node at the base of ggtree's default layout
# this node has no biological meaning as a root, just an artifact of how the tree was ladderized/displayed
# adding a segment here implies directionality that doesn't exist in the data
# I midpoint rooted it upstream instead of this
# # add root branch
# root_y <- tree_plotted$data$y[tree_plotted$data$node == getMRCA(tree, tree$tip.label)]
# tree_plotted <- tree_plotted + 
#   annotate("segment", x = -0.0001, xend = 0, y = root_y, yend = root_y)

plot(tree_plotted)

# save
ggsave(paste(OUTPUT_DIR, "figS8.png", sep="/"), tree_plotted, width=5, height=15)
ggsave(paste(OUTPUT_DIR, "figS8.pdf", sep="/"), tree_plotted, width=5, height=15)

# June 4, 2025
# August 13, 2025
```
